summary: EXP-366 PATCH-A: adds one-phrase parenthetical to WIN-006.detail_verdict_text clarifying that NOAA NGDC NP.xy is a model-reconstructed product blending gufm1 (pre-1900) and the IGRF series (modern era), not a raw measurement file. Pre-empts the dome-advocate question "is NP.xy raw data or model output?" The post-hoc argument is not weakened — Part 3.1b trivial-transcription test applies to any indexed published dataset regardless of raw-vs-reconstructed status. After applying patch, close ISS-1912 with fixed_by=EXP-366-PATCH-A.
